reasoning: 18 consecutive weeks at #1 on the Billboard 200 is an extremely high bar that has not been achieved since The Bodyguard (1993). Even Taylor Swift's massive 2024 album 'The Tortured Poets Department' only managed 12 consecutive weeks before dropping from the top spot. Since her new album 'The Life of a Showgirl' is on a steep decline (dropping from 4 million in week 1 to 120k in week 5), it will unquestionably be overtaken during the competitive Q4/Holiday release window, well before reaching 18 weeks in mid-February 2026. Thus, the probability is at the lowest bound.
